full_text:
Sima Lang (Boda) 司馬朗 (伯達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Lang (司馬朗), styledBoda (伯達), was born in Henei. Humane offical, his governing was popular with the people. Sima Lang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Sima Lang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
